title: SystemVerilog interfaces: Internal error when connecting interfaces

features.name: interface with modport master declaration
features.description: Code should include an interface definition with a modport declaration using the 'master' keyword

features.name: interface instantiation with modport master connection
features.description: Code should include an interface instantiation where a modport is connected using the .master() syntax

features.name: interface signal access via dot notation in assign
features.description: Code should include an assign statement accessing interface signals via dot notation

features.name: hierarchical interface with nested interface instantiation
features.description: Code should include an interface that contains instances of another interface, forming a hierarchical interface structure

features.name: module port of interface type with hierarchical connection
features.description: Code should include a module with an interface-typed port that is connected hierarchically across module boundaries
